must_detect.matched_text: Kokoro Systems K.K. (listed on Hinode Stock Exchange Prime) Privacy and MNPI Handling Notice for Proposed Acquisition of Aoba Robotics G.K.

Under the APPI, we process personal data of living individuals, including individual numbers (My Number) and individual identification codes, for HR, payroll, and board-governed acquisition workflows.

Third-party provision: during diligence we may transfer limited employee data to processors (e.g., Hanazono Due Diligence Ltd. and Hinode Securities Clearing Center, both fictional) under contract requiring safeguards and foreign data disclosure notices per APPI.
Transfers outside Japan, if any, require prior opt-in consent and notice of the foreign personal information protection system; records of provision are maintained for three years.

DSAR limits: we may refuse or defer disclosure if disclosure is likely to seriously impede proper conduct of the acquisition or violate the FIEA, while providing reasons and complaint routes to the competent authority.
